name: yeeflow-app-builder
description: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications with chart runtime model contract hardening.

interface.longDescription:
v0.8.110 releases Chart runtime model contract hardening. Generated Data Analytics chart and pivot controls require exactly one matching Resource.exts[] runtime entry plus Resource.ReportIds[] registration, source ListID metadata must resolve to package source fields, visible attrs.data/attrs.model/attrs.series[]/attrs.values[] surfaces must align with runtime rows/values, and runtime evidence fails on Yeeflow chart model-load errors before signing readiness. v0.8.109 releases FormNewReports upgrade omission hardening. Dashboard-only upgrade scope validation treats FormNewReports: [] as omission of unchanged installed Form reports, not deletion, when report changes are not in scope; real report mutations still require explicit report scope and update-safe proof before signing readiness. v0.8.107 releases refreshed Dashboard master-detail workspace YDP templates. Two-Panel and Three-Panel Workspace layouts preserve the 520px left panel, move left_panel_sidebar into current_item_main_header_left, add the editable left_panel_caption_icon_wrapper / left_panel_caption_icon source icon slot, expose explicit current-item edit/delete operation buttons, keep generic operation buttons repeatable, and prune no-action workspace operation containers before signing readiness. v0.8.106 releases Service Tickets runtime semantics, Data Analytics parser alignment, and Dashboard content-card fidelity hardening. Generated master-detail Priority and Status filters preserve proven option-source choices and bind to matching business fields, selected-record detail labels and Dynamic controls stay aligned, identity-picker and file-upload seed artifacts emit structured live-write requirements, source-template loan/asset copy is blocked outside matching domains, Region/Surface analytics tables resolve to the current Dashboard heading, and Dashboard content_card_wrapper modules preserve valid section_title_area/header slots before signing readiness. v0.8.104 releases full-app materializer resource/runtime fixes. Generated Data Lists preserve one native Title field and reuse it for business title display metadata, rounded 19-digit API IDs are rejected before materialization, App Plan Data Analytics rows materialize into visible chart/pivot controls plus ReportIds/exts runtime models, visible Dashboard KPI values bind to the same Summary save_var expression object used by hidden Summary controls, and identity-picker fields remain schema-safe Text-backed controls rather than FieldType User. v0.8.103 releases Data List identity-picker storage correction. Generated user/person/requester/assignee fields materialize as schema-safe TextN fields with FieldType "Text" and Type "identity-picker", legacy UserN planning keys are remapped instead of emitted, and Service Tickets regression coverage rejects unsupported UserN / FieldType "User" Data List output before signing readiness. v0.8.98 releases Data Analytics runtime chart type code hardening. Generated chart runtime extensions use Yeeflow runtime chart type codes for pie, line/area, and bar/column charts, date-based line/area rows include func DATE, and generated-final validation rejects semantic chart type strings before signing readiness. v0.8.96 releases page-scoped template dependency namespace and Service Tickets E2E regression hardening from PR #334. Generated pages and forms rename copied golden-reference filter variables, temp variables, and form actions per surface to prevent same-page collisions, preserve Service Tickets Status/Text5 and identity-picker field contracts, avoid materializing support subsections such as Summary Metrics as standalone Dashboard pages, attach custom Data List forms to explicit host lists, and scrub Office Asset/loan source-template residue from Service Tickets-style Dashboard and View Item resources before signing readiness. v0.8.95 releases Dashboard navigator-label, expression-binding, and business-residue cleanup hardening from PR #332. Generated master-detail workspace pages recursively assign business-specific nv_label/nav_label metadata inside copied Collection item templates, reject visible raw formula strings in Dashboard text controls, remove source-template loan/Office Asset business copy from Service Tickets-style pages, prune optional section_title_area modules when both section_title_header and configured Operations are absent, and prevent supporting custom Data List View forms from inheriting unplanned Dashboard KPI rows or title-only copied sections before signing readiness. v0.8.94 releases Dashboard master-detail workspace materialization hardening from PR #329. Generated two-panel and three-panel workspace Dashboards preserve the selected-item vCurrentItemID runtime contract, left-panel item selection actions, right-panel current-item Collection limit and vCurrentItemID filter binding, source-ID remapping, approved left_panel_filter_group usage, data-list view navigation target resolution, and Service Tickets generated-final preflight coverage before signing readiness. v0.8.93 releases Dashboard master-detail workspace page layout templates from PR #326. App Plans can select dashboard-page-layouts-two-panel-workspace or dashboard-page-layouts-three-panel-workspace for Outlook-style dataset management workspaces, generated Dashboards preserve the selected-item vCurrentItemID temp-variable contract, left-item selection action, right current-item Collection limit/filter contract, editable slots, optional operations, empty-selection state, chart-card regions, create-capable add-button rules, and App Plan validator alignment for the new layout IDs before signing readiness. v0.8.92 releases E2E helper path, title, and install reporting alignment from PR #324. First-generation preflight resolves relative package, App Plan, and ID provenance paths from the caller working directory, full-app materialization uses explicit App Plan application names without planning document suffix leakage, and package API install/import reporting separates submitted API acceptance from final Version Management/runtime proof while still exposing safe canonical application links from decoded package root proof when available. v0.8.91 releases business-semantic application color palette selection from PR #322. App Plans choose Primary, Secondary, and Neutral base colors from explicit user branding or a business-domain-specific palette instead of silently falling back to generic Yeeflow defaults, generated packages materialize the selected palette with lightmodel \"Luminance\", and hard gates reject identifiable business-domain apps that still use the generic default palette without explicit user approval before signing readiness. v0.8.90 releases Dashboard runtime data binding hardening from PR #319. Generated Data Analytics controls emit visible chart/pivot source metadata that matches Resource.exts[] runtime source metadata, COUNT analytics use ListDataID consistently across field, fieldName, FieldName, and id, and hard gates reject source drift or incomplete rows/values that can render blank charts at runtime. v0.8.89 releases application color pattern theme config from PR #317. Generated App Plans declare Application Color Pattern Selection for Primary, Secondary, and Neutral base colors, full-app materialization writes selected colors into the Type 0 application style Config with lightmodel "Luminance", and application-control-style/preflight gates validate stringified Config, base-color readability ranges, low-chroma Neutral, and App Plan-to-package matching before signing readiness. v0.8.88 releases section_content_area gap s200 golden-reference enforcement from PR #315. Dashboard, Workbench Dashboard, Data List Form, Data List Form Workbench, and Approval Form layout templates preserve attrs.style.gap [null, "--sp--s200"] on real section_content_area controls, and generated or registry resources that regress to the obsolete --sp--s0 gap fail before signing readiness. Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying proven YAP/YAPK import-generation rules, documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, Browser OAuth-backed Yeeflow REST API authentication, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, product-team canonical YAP/YAPK schemas with a separate Codex YAPK overlay, effective YAPK schema validation, generated-final YAP contracts, generated-final YAPK API-issued content ID provenance gates, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata gates, dashboard grid-table Collection pattern gates, UI/Summary/KPI runtime hard gates, approval form designer-shape validation, workflow assignment assignee guardrails for manager-based and job-position routing, release safety scanning, ReplaceIds final coverage rules, workflow task URL page-type gates, advanced Yeeflow controls, reference-app UI templates, data-list system schema rules, read-only workspace discovery and selection, package materialization validation, app-plan-to-implementation conformance, navigation conformance guardrails, runtime-binding lessons for dashboard Summary/filter bindings, approval real-control validation, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID and service portal payload guards, signing/API proof boundaries, policy-as-data modeling, and official plugin release management. v0.8.87 releases the Application Layout Sidebar Workspace golden reference from PR #313. Generated applications use application-layout-sidebar-workspace-1 as the default application layout template, preserve export-derived header height, title typography, header colors, vertical navigation layout, navigation colors, and appearance settings, require App Plan template selection, and reject generated navigation groups or menu items without business-appropriate FontAwesome icons before signing readiness. v0.8.86 releases Approval form page-title empty section cleanup from PR #311. Generated Approval submission/task pages and Data List/Schedule workflow task forms prune empty section_content_area slots outside real business content, including page_title_section empty slots, while preserving locked workflow panel/history surfaces, and validation rejects empty generated section content slots through APPROVAL_FORM_LAYOUT_EMPTY_SECTION_CONTENT_AREA before signing readiness. v0.8.85 releases application control style fresh ID remap from PR #309. Generated fresh .yapk packages clone the Soft outline Type 1 control style theme with a fresh package-local UUID, update the Type 0 application style default binding through Ext.controlDefaultId, reject reused exported template style IDs or non-UUID control style IDs before signing readiness, and preserve locked style tokens and ordinary configuration values. v0.8.84 releases workflow layout golden reference gates from PR #307. Generated Approval form, Data list workflow, and Scheduled workflow diagrams use export-derived workflow layout guidance, validate readable node spacing and graph bounds, preserve rounded/routed sequence-flow lines for cross-lane, rejected, and long paths, and block overlapping workflow diagrams before signing readiness. v0.8.83 releases Soft outline application control style default gates from PR #305. Generated applications include the export-backed Soft outline controls Application Custom Control Style in Themes[], set it as the application default through the Type 0 application style theme, validate stringified style config and default linkage before signing readiness, and keep full-app materializer regression coverage aligned with the package schema-safe generated-final shape. v0.8.82 releases Dashboard filter variable consumer materialization from PR #303. Generated Dashboard search-filter variables are wired to Collection attrs.data.fulltext[] consumers, producer controls no longer count as consumption, stale producer bindings and unconsumed filterVars[] entries are pruned, and full-app materializer regression coverage blocks generated Dashboards whose filter variables or search-filter bindings are not backed by real Summary, Collection, Data table, chart, or pivot consumers. v0.8.72 releases Collection runtime visibility and Approval task readonly gates from PR #283. Generated Dashboard Collections require resolved Primary order/sort metadata, fulltext and Dynamic control field-binding surfaces that resolve against the selected source list schema, including dynamic-user controls for user/identity fields. Approval task forms mirror submitted business fields as runtime-effective readonly review context unless explicitly excluded or made editable, using both top-level and attrs readonly/readOnly flags. v0.8.71 releases Data table control golden reference templates from PR #281. The plugin registers data_table_control_standard_scroll, data_table_control_standard_no_scroll, and data_table_control_caption_scroll, requires App Plans to select approved Data table templates for planned Data table regions, preserves locked Data table style/layout/typography/column-width/caption/search/add/more toolbar/source/display-column contracts, and validates Dashboard, custom Data List form, Approval form, workflow task form, and Approval print-page usage before signing readiness. v0.8.70 releases the Data List Form Workbench View Item layout template from PR #279. The plugin registers data_list_form_layout_workbench alongside the existing Data List Form Layouts v1.1 New/Edit and standard View templates, preserves the full parsed Workbench item details form resource as an independent JSON template, requires App Plans to mark Workbench View forms as Full page, enforces ListModel.LayoutView.view opentype.view = "new", and validates Workbench primary_working_area, optional right_side_panel cleanup, removable chart_cards_section, and Data Analytics chart_cards_section placement rules. v0.8.69 releases the Workbench Dashboard page layout template from PR #277. The plugin registers dashboard-page-layouts-workbench alongside dashboard-page-layouts-v1.1, preserves the full parsed Workbench Dashboard page resource as an independent JSON template, requires App Plans to select the dashboard page layout per Dashboard, enforces Workbench primary_working_area and optional right_side_panel cleanup rules, and validates chart_cards_section placement for Data Analytics templates. v0.8.68 releases Dashboard Collection and Pie/Data Analytics golden rebuild gates from PR #275. Generated multiselect grid-table Collections preserve the real grid_table_col_body Collection root while rebuilding approved template internals, cloned Dashboard template UUID-like values are re-instantiated per page, Pie/Data Analytics controls clone the full approved wrapper instead of simplified chart shells, chart runtime attrs/model/series/values stay aligned with ReportIds/exts settings, and COUNT analytics use real source fields with aggregate metadata instead of derived pseudo-field IDs. v0.8.67 releases Approval workflow condition and upgrade proof gates from PR #273. Generated Approval workflows use Designer-readable left/op/right Completion condition metadata for Approved and Rejected outcomes, line-manager assignment is bound through ApplicantUserID, canonical end-node routing is enforced, and Approval workflow upgrades require live Designer/DefBlob proof after Version Management Succeed. v0.8.65 releases repository root hygiene and compatibility gates from PR #269. Historical root generator helpers now live under tools/generators/, runtime proof studies under docs/studies/root-runtime-proofs/, and runtime test specifications under fixtures/runtime-test-specs/; public root CLI/validator/wrapper entrypoints remain stable, source/dist reference paths are aligned, and scripts/test-repo-root-hygiene.mjs prevents root-level proof and generator clutter from returning. v0.8.64 releases layout cleanup, live install readiness, and validator-entrypoint alignment gates from PR #267. Generated Dashboard, Data List form, and Approval form layouts prune unused copied sections; Approval task forms preserve Submission form business fields as readonly context unless explicitly overridden; generated-final signing readiness rejects placeholder TenantID "0"; runtime proof scopes Install failed tiles to the target app; and public YAPK validator entrypoints remain byte-aligned to prevent duplicate-rule drift. v0.8.63 releases Data List custom form LayoutView runtime-source gates from PR #265. Generated Type 1 custom Data List forms duplicate complete form JSON into both LayoutView and LayoutInResources[0].Resource, and generated-final validation blocks missing, placeholder, or drifting LayoutView runtime sources before signing readiness. v0.8.61 releases Approval form unused section cleanup gates from PR #261. Generated Approval submission/task pages remove no-action Operations containers, remove empty copied business sections, preserve the locked action_panel_flow_history_wrapper, and keep fieldless generated forms valid with a single no-fields business content card instead of unused template scaffolding.  v0.8.59 releases Approval form field materialization hard gates from PR #257. App Plan Submission Form Fields and Task Form Fields are generation inputs; generated Forms[].DefResource.pageurls[].formdef must contain planned business fields inside approved Approval Form Field Layouts v1.1 wrappers; and shell-only Approval forms are blocked before signing readiness. v0.8.58 releases Data List custom form default-layout hard gates from PR #254. Generated business Data Lists and Document Libraries must plan and assign custom New/Edit/View forms instead of Yeeflow default layouts; List.LayoutView.add/edit/view must resolve to same-list Type 1 custom form layouts; App Plan Section 10 must cover every Section 4 business list/library with New/Edit and View Data List Form Layouts v1.1 template selections; and the full-app materializer, generated data-list schema validator, and YAPK package validator now enforce the same routing contract before signing readiness. v0.8.57 releases Dashboard Collection search-template retirement and analytics identity hardening from PR #252. collection_control_grid_table_with_search is retired from approved Dashboard Collection golden references; search/fulltext is behavior inside approved Collection templates, copied Collection source IDs/placeholders are recursively rewritten, generated Data Analytics controls use UUID-shaped runtime IDs aligned with ReportIds/exts, and display labels such as series[].name are not treated as source fields. v0.8.56 releases Approval Form Fields Grid v1.1 golden references from PR #250. Generated Approval form submission/task form field groups must clone approval_form_fields_grid_2col_v1_1 or approval_form_fields_grid_3col_v1_1, App Plans must select the chosen field-grid template per form field group, and generated-final preflight blocks field controls outside approved wrappers, nonzero field margins, invalid responsive column counts, full-row span mismatches, and missing business-specific field nav_label metadata. v0.8.54 releases Dashboard filter runtime and full-upgrade proof gates from PR #246. Generated Dashboards must not use unproven page-level select-filter variables consumed by Collection In conditions because empty select-filter state can clear all Collection rows at runtime. Search-filter/fulltext display is preferred until an export-proven empty-value bypass exists. Dashboard-only upgrades must be full packages with non-Dashboard resources preserved and unchanged-diff proof, and final runtime proof requires business rows, no No data, no [object Object], real Data List Collection bindings, search-filter behavior, exact PackageId Version Management Succeed, and error-log capture on failure. v0.8.53 releases standard Data Filter group golden reference gates from PR #244. Pages/forms with two or more page-level Data Filter controls must clone dashboard_standard_filter_group, preserve the approved wrapper and child filter style contract, exclude local Collection toolbar search controls, and pass generated-final preflight before signing readiness. v0.8.51 releases live E2E install readiness gates from PR #239. Generated-final preflight blocks wrapper/root ListID mismatch, Dashboard page root ownership drift, cross-page Dashboard template control UUID reuse, missing nested dashboard/approval DefResource ID provenance, approval DefResource key drift, and install proof overclaims before signing. API status 0 remains submitted-only; final success requires exact Version Management PackageId status Succeed. v0.8.50 releases signing-readiness preflight handoff reporting from PR #237. Standalone materialization remains signing-ineligible and reports materializerSigningEligible false, preflightEligibleForSigning null, and signingReadinessSource not-run. yapk-first-generation-preflight now reports the actual local pre-sign readiness with preflightEligibleForSigning and signingReadiness so a passed preflight can proceed to explicit signing without misreading the materializer boundary as a package-quality failure. v0.8.49 releases Dashboard select-filter option-source placeholder hard gates from PR #235. Generated Dashboard select filters must not emit literal {{ListDataID}} current-item placeholders in attrs.data.filter[].value. The standalone materializer now emits filter: [] when no validated runtime option-source filter is required, and dataset golden-reference validation reports DASH_SELECT_FILTER_OPTION_SOURCE_PLACEHOLDER_UNRESOLVED before signing readiness. v0.8.48 releases Dashboard Collection action placeholder hard gates from PR #233. Generated-final Dashboard Collection template actions must rewrite or remove source-template placeholders such as {{ListSetID}}, {{ListID}}, {{DetailLayoutID}}, {{sourceLongId}}, and {{search}} before signing readiness. The standalone materializer now rewrites concrete runtime list/detail references, prunes unsupported detail/open actions when no detail layout exists, emits expression-token filter/fulltext conditions, and the dataset golden-reference validator blocks unresolved template placeholders anywhere in decoded Dashboard resources. v0.8.47 releases full-app Data Analytics materialization runtime gates from PR #231. Generated-final full-app materialization parses App Plan Data Analytics Template Selection rows, clones selected approved Pie, Column, Bar, Line, Area, and Pivot templates into Dashboard v1.1 two/three-column sections, binds chart/pivot runtime models to included data-list fields, and first-generation preflight blocks planned analytics templates that are not materialized. The materializer also emits runtime-safe select choices, maps identity fields to Dynamic user controls, prevents unresolved Collection detail-link placeholders, and writes post-install seed-data companion artifacts instead of embedding sample rows in generated-final .yapk content. v0.8.46 releases root application icon, Dashboard empty-section, and filter-shape hard gates from PR #229. Generated-final packages must keep wrapper and decoded root ListSet.IconUrl FontAwesome JSON surfaces aligned, reject empty visible Dashboard v1.1 section_content_area modules, require select-filter label values, reject malformed select/search placeholder objects, and the standalone materializer propagates root icons, prunes unused copied dashboard sections, and emits safe filter label/placeholder shapes. v0.8.45 releases YAPK Bit/switch field hard gates from PR #227. Generated-final YAPK Bit fields must use FieldType = "Bit", runtime Type = "switch", string default values "0" or "1", and matching switch rows in default and custom LayoutView metadata. First-generation preflight blocks wrong Bit control types before signing readiness, and the standalone materializer maps planned boolean, yes/no, and flag fields to switch metadata. v0.8.44 releases Data List Form Fields Grid v1.1 and Sub List control golden references from PR #225. Generated custom Data List forms must place current-record fields inside data_list_form_fields_grid_v1_1, Sub list fields must clone data_list_form_control_sublist_v1_1, generated field controls must carry business-specific nav_label metadata and zero field margins, responsive grid column/span constraints are enforced, and Dashboard/Data List Form Layouts v1.1 may host field-grid and Collection templates only inside approved section_content_area slots under content_card_wrapper, content_card_60_wrapper, or content_card_40_wrapper. v0.8.43 releases Data List Form Layouts v1.1 golden references from PR #223. Generated custom Data List New/Edit forms must clone data_list_form_layout_new_edit_v1_1, View Item forms must clone data_list_form_layout_view_item_v1_1, App Plans must select the correct Data List Form Layout template, and generated-final preflight blocks custom forms that mutate locked template regions, omit template provenance, or place business content outside approved slots. v0.8.42 releases Dashboard Summary hidden-host and field metadata gates from PR #221. Generated Dashboard KPI Summary controls now live inside dedicated hidden host containers, Summary count controls include designer-shaped ListDataID field metadata, first-generation YAPK preflight runs the Summary contract inspector, and generated packages cannot proceed toward signing readiness with missing Summary hidden hosts or unresolved Summary field metadata. v0.8.41 releases full-app materializer fixture ID demand alignment from PR #219. Regression fixture mode now allocates enough synthetic API-shaped numeric string IDs for nontrivial App Plan resource graphs while remaining regression-only, signingEligible false, and forbidden for signing, install/import, upgrade, seed data, Version Management, or browser/runtime proof. v0.8.40 releases Dashboard KPI temp variable binding hard gates from PR #217. Generated Dashboard KPI values are rebound to page-local Summary/temp variables, source-template Event Portfolio temp variable residue is blocked, undeclared KPI temp variable references fail generated-final validation, and each visible KPI value gets matching Summary, ReportIds, exts, and tempVars metadata before generated-final signing eligibility can be considered. v0.8.39 releases full-app Dashboard filter, dataset-region, and resource-depth materialization from PR #215. The standalone materializer emits App Plan-declared Dashboard select filters with field metadata and Collection consumption bindings, maps dataset regions reliably, preserves approved internal Collection wrapper references without misclassification, completes grid-table gap/detail-layout contracts, expands generated data lists with planned business fields, and attaches custom forms to the correct source lists. v0.8.38 releases full-app Dashboard v1.1 Collection template materialization from PR #213. The standalone materializer clones the Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 shell, parses App Plan Dashboard dataset rows, materializes the exact selected Collection template inside approved section_content_area business slots, preserves Collection provenance, page-level dependencies, and Summary/KPI temp-variable bindings, and delegates approved Collection template internals to specialized validators. v0.8.37 releases Area chart and Data Analytics template selection guidance from PR #211. The plugin registers six approved Data Analytics templates, including Area chart, and App Plans must use the Data Analytics Template Selection table to choose exactly one approved analytics template per chart/pivot region by business fit, source-resource type, grouping/axis fields, value/aggregate fields, proof boundary, and Dashboard v1.1 placement constraints. v0.8.36 releases full-app materializer generated-final preflight alignment from PR #209. Nontrivial materialized packages must preserve API-issued IDs as strings, emit decoded-resource ID provenance paths, generate runtime navigation metadata, generated data-list default views, canonical approval DefResource workflow/task/action metadata, and dashboard Summary/filter/Collection runtime metadata before signing eligibility can be considered. v0.8.34 releases generated-final resource-completeness path-independent test harness hardening from PR #205. The focused regression harness resolves the validator by absolute path, invokes it from an external working directory, emits explicit diagnostics when validator JSON or findings output is missing, and keeps the planned approval form with decoded Forms: [] hard failure enforced. v0.8.33 releases full-app materializer resource-demand precision gates from PR #203. FULL_APP_MATERIALIZATION_RESOURCE_GRAPH_NOT_IMPLEMENTED reports must include exact planned resource names, counts, and missing generated-final output surfaces, and App Plan fields, dashboard sections, metrics, filters, item-template rows, validator commands, and prose must not inflate resource-demand counts. Nontrivial App Plans remain package-free and not signing/install eligible until full resource-graph materialization and generated-final preflight pass. v0.8.32 releases full-app materializer fail-closed resource-graph gates from PR #201. The standalone materializer must fail with FULL_APP_MATERIALIZATION_RESOURCE_GRAPH_NOT_IMPLEMENTED for nontrivial App Plans when it cannot generate the declared data lists, approval forms, reports, dashboards, navigation, and related resources. Placeholder or schema-smoke output is never signing/install eligible. v0.8.31 releases the full-app generated-final materialization entrypoint from PR #199. Clean-room generation can call scripts/materialize-full-app-generated-final.mjs from approved Functional Specification and Yeeflow App Plan Markdown plus an API-issued ID manifest to emit a generated-final .yapk, decoded resource, ID provenance report, and generation report. Fixture ID mode is regression-only and not signing/install eligible, and the CLI never signs, installs/imports, upgrades, seeds data, or claims runtime proof. v0.8.30 releases Data Analytics golden reference templates from PR #197. Pie chart, Column chart, Bar chart, Line chart, and Pivot table controls must clone approved export-shaped templates, preserve locked style/layout/typography, use Dashboard or Data List form surfaces only, block Approval form usage, and place Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 analytics templates only inside 2-column or 3-column sections. v0.8.29 releases first-generation smoke and installed-cache-root alignment from PR #195. Account Health first-generation smoke positive fixtures must be generated-final preflight-clean, stale seed-row/native-Title/simplified-dashboard shapes remain negative regressions, and cache/UI hard gates support both source checkouts and installed Codex plugin payload roots without requiring a nested dist directory inside installed cache payloads. v0.8.28 releases the full export-shaped collection_control_grid_table template from PR #193. Generated Dashboard grid-table Collections must clone the approved grid_table_col_wrapper, preserve locked wrapper/caption/operation/action structure, map editable title/search/button/header/item/operation regions through approved slots, keep grid_table_col_header and grid_col_item columns aligned, use field-type compatible Dynamic controls, omit operation/caption layers for display-only or non-mutable sources, and preserve delete-confirmation temp variable/action wiring when item operations are enabled. v0.8.27 releases the full export-shaped collection_control_responsive_card_grid template from PR #191. Generated Dashboard responsive-card Collections must clone the approved collection_control_responsive_card_wrapper, preserve locked wrapper/item/caption/action structure, map editable title/search/button/item fields through approved slots, use field-type compatible Dynamic controls, omit image controls when no Image field exists, and preserve delete-confirmation temp variable/action wiring when item operations are enabled. v0.8.26 releases Dashboard template materialization fidelity gates from PR #189. Approved Dashboard Collection/KPI templates are clone-and-map contracts; grid-table multiselect output must preserve full-width wrapper/caption/content layers, locked spacing, source-domain text replacement, select action wiring, Designer-compatible filter condition shape, and approved KPI row/card materialization instead of helper-created lookalikes. v0.8.25 releases clean full E2E install, seed, approval, and dashboard quality gates from PR #187. Package API Status 0 is submitted/accepted only, generated-final YAPK packages cannot embed seed rows in Childs[].List.Items, approval DefResource must include real task routing and Approved/Rejected paths, runtime proof rejects install-failed and empty Components shells, dashboards reject source-template/generic visible residue, and seed-derived KPI expected values can be enforced. v0.8.24 releases Dashboard multiselect template fidelity and materialization gates from PR #185. Card and grid-table multiselect template artifacts now require Text heads typography and plain-string color metadata, grid-table multiselect preserves zero-gap wrapper metadata, uses {{DetailLayoutID}} as the source detail-layout replacement contract, and generated dashboards must materialize planned Summary/KPI and Data Filter controls instead of Collection-only pages. v0.8.20 releases Dashboard Collection template materialization conformance gates from PR #177. Generated-final validation now compares each App Plan Dashboard dataset region with the generated Dashboard Collection region, fails missing planned regions, template mismatches, collapsed template diversity, App Plan-selected templates not materialized, and missing explicit Collection-root template provenance. v0.8.19 releases Dashboard Golden Reference property fidelity gates from PR #175. Generated Dashboard modules must preserve child-control typography and filter appearance contracts from Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 / Event Portfolio references, including title, subtitle, KPI, grid-table header, select-filter label layout, placeholder color, radius, and fixed-width positioning. v0.8.17 releases validator semantic tolerance and Dashboard dataset line-scope fixes from PR #171. Dashboard dataset presentation validation now reads only canonical dataset/reference table rows and ignores prose, Form Report explanations, identity tables, and validator command lists. App Plan resource-order validation accepts equivalent business wording for required intent without weakening schema or ordering gates. v0.8.16 releases the full-app skill-callable generation entrypoint contract from PR #169. The full-app entrypoint registry now marks yeeflow-application-builder and yeeflow-application-generator as first-class callable Codex skill entrypoints, requires machine-readable invocation contracts, and prevents clean-room runs from stopping after approved planning solely because no standalone CLI exists. v0.8.15 releases full-app entrypoint cache-path alignment from PR #167. The full-app entrypoint registry now supports both source checkout paths such as skills/installed/<skill-name>/SKILL.md and installed plugin payload paths such as skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md; clean-room validation from the active plugin cache must pass the same entrypoint gate instead of stopping before package generation because of source-only skill paths. v0.8.14 releases full-app generation entrypoint and Collection template exact-match gates from PR #165. Clean-room generation must inspect the full-app entrypoint registry before claiming no generator path from functional-specification.md and yeeflow-app-plan.md; proof, delivery, package API, runtime-proof, and sample helper scripts are explicitly not full-app generators. Dashboard Collection template validation now uses exact template-token matching so multiselect/search grid-table references do not collide with the base grid-table template, while generated Dashboard Collections still must use approved presentation templates inside Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 slots. v0.8.13 releases Dashboard Collection template slot decision gates from PR #163. App Plan Dashboard dataset regions that use Collection must select exactly one approved presentation reference using registry guidance; generated Dashboard Collections are component-level dataset regions inside Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 slots such as section_content_area; copied source shells, root Content placement, invented or simplified Collection templates, and source-reference field/label/ID leakage are blockers. v0.8.12 releases Dashboard root binding, v1.1 Content padding, and runtime proof gates from PR #161. Generated-final Dashboard Type 103 pages must bind Pages[].ListID to the decoded package root ListSet.ListID while LayoutID remains the page layout resource ID, Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 Content padding must preserve the canonical template, package API runtime URL proof uses the decoded package root ListSetID, sanitized server messages are preserved, and already-installed fresh-install responses are routed to upgrade-check / upgrade-apply follow-up. v0.8.11 releases Dashboard dataset presentation Golden References from PR #159. Dashboard Collection dataset regions must select one approved presentation reference, App Plans must name the selected reference and business rationale without runtime IDs or low-level payload properties, and generated-final validation blocks missing provenance, unknown templates, simplified grid-table structures, missing multiselect action contracts, and missing search/fulltext linkage before signing. v0.8.10 releases YAPK Dashboard runtime materialization and preflight gates from PR #157. Generated-final validation now fails KPI cards without Summary/ReportIds/exts/tempVars/save_var/visible bindings, unconsumed dashboard filters or placeholder filter conditions, business controls inside page_title_section, simplified grid-table/Data table lookalikes, shared Collection wrappers, Dynamic user field-family mismatches, embedded ListDatas sample rows, and App Plan parser fail-open cases before signing. v0.8.9 releases Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 validator alignment from PR #155. Aggregate dashboard and YAPK validators now treat v1.1 as the page shell, keep Event Portfolio Golden Reference checks as component/region checks inside approved v1.1 slots, reuse v1.1 identity detection for Main, Content, actions, and navigator/control labels, allow required generator normalization, and continue blocking competing Event Portfolio root shells, invented layout modules, and business content outside approved section content. v0.8.8 releases Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 controlled-slot and repeatable-module enforcement from PR #153. Generated dashboards must preserve the v1.1 template shell, business-specific content may change only inside registered allowed business-content containers, new layout sections may only be added by copying registered repeatable/removable modules, additional KPI cards must copy the approved planned-events KPI card pattern, invented dashboard layout modules are rejected, and visual-only Operations placeholders remain blocked. v0.8.7 releases Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 template adoption from PR #151. It registers Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 as the required page shell, enforces standard dashboard page structure with page background, Main > Content, page title/header, content cards, 1/2/3-column sections, 60/40 section, and KPI wrapper, uses the v1.1 shell together with Event Portfolio component/region golden references, adds Full-width structural container and section title/content area checks, allows Operations only when real actions exist, requires canonical runtime route proof, and preserves dashboard-only upgrade scope. v0.8.6 releases Dashboard Golden Reference export-shape parity from PR #149. It updates the Event Portfolio Dashboard Golden Reference source, enforces strict _ak_c/_ak_c_opt export-shape parity, adds golden-reference quality lint, requires Full-width sections and KPI cards, checks root Content zero padding, enforces high-level Container layout with approved table-internal flex_grid exceptions, strengthens filter label/placeholder and field/display/value/apply contract gates, adds static filter consumer linkage checks, adds runtime filter before/after data-change proof, enforces dynamic-user rendering for user/identity fields, and rejects provenance-only simplified dashboard shells. v0.8.5 adds Dashboard Golden Reference enforcement from PR #147. It registers the Event Portfolio dashboard as the default golden reference with reusable header, filter, KPI, content, and grid-table region references; adds dashboard golden-reference conformance validation; registers the conformance gate in dashboard hard gates and YAPK preflight; enforces generated dashboard provenance; blocks copying Event-specific fields into unrelated apps; and documents the dashboard golden-reference selection and consumption lifecycle. v0.8.3 adds generated-final YAPK export-shape and runtime materialization gates from PR #143. Approval DefResource metadata must use export-shaped process metadata with canonical ::brotli:: Brotli/base64 encoding, page registrations, workflow graph IDs, positions, variables, links, task URLs, and key/defkey consistency. Minimal approval placeholders and count-only FormNewReports/DataReports placeholders are rejected unless explicitly deferred with App Plan impact. Dashboard materialization checks require visible runtime-safe business sections bound to included resources, distinguish hidden Summary hosts from visible KPI proof, and reject unsafe Summary/chart models without complete runtime-proven configuration. PortalInfo:null is accepted for no-portal YAPK packages while PortalInfo:{} and [] remain invalid. Native Title export metadata, TenantID wrapper provenance boundaries, and runtime URL mismatch reporting from decoded ListSet.ListID are enforced. v0.8.2 adds generated-final resource completeness gates against the approved App Plan before signing readiness. Generated packages must materialize planned approval forms, custom forms, FormNewReports, DataReports, dashboard KPI/filter/Summary/Collection/Data table regions, navigation groups/items, data lists, and other non-deferred resources. Shell-only dashboards, generic-only navigation, and partial generated-final package surfaces are blocked unless explicitly deferred in the App Plan with reason, fallback/user impact, and follow-up proof. v0.8.1 fixes App Plan schema/validator consistency after the v0.8.0 planning-quality release. The primary App Plan remains yeeflow-app-plan.md with the canonical Yeeflow App Plan resource-order Markdown schema, validate-app-plan-template.mjs and validate-app-plan-resource-order.mjs now enforce the same contract, Functional Specification generation must emit every canonical Markdown section, Dashboard Pages Plan legal Yeeflow control-type planning remains the only App Plan template enhancement, low-level implementation leakage remains blocked, and negative guardrail wording such as unsupported-shape blockers no longer causes false unsupported-control findings. v0.8.0 adds Functional Specification and App Plan Dashboard planning quality gates. Functional Specifications must be primary Markdown documents with richer business context, roles, process, status lifecycle, business rules, data requirements, approval/form requirements, workflows, dashboard business requirements, reporting/audit needs, permissions, and clarification gates. Yeeflow App Plans must be primary Markdown documents, preserve the overall resource-order template structure, and enhance only Dashboard Pages Plan with legal Yeeflow control-type planning that maps Functional Spec dashboard requirements to Summary/KPI, Data Filter, Collection, Data table, Kanban, timeline, Text/Heading, Button/action, Container, Grid/flex grid, or proof/deferred analytics categories. Planning documents reject low-level implementation leakage such as runtime IDs, ListID/PageID/FormID/LayoutID/ProcKey, actionTypeCode, JSON property paths, exact layout JSON, style values, generated payloads, and fake placeholder IDs. Generated application wrappers must use FontAwesome icon JSON strings, not image URLs. Dashboard generation-time gates now enforce filter display/value/style metadata, coded Container width/layout values, native KPI Icon controls, Summary field-selection/runtime binding consistency, and canonical application URL reporting from decoded ListSet.ListID. v0.6.64 adds Business Clarification unique unresolved gate summary reporting. The Business Clarification validator keeps raw findings for diagnostics while adding rawFindingCount, uniqueUnresolvedGateCount, uniqueUnresolvedGateKeys, and gateOccurrences to JSON output. Planning reports can now show duplicated Functional Specification and Yeeflow App Plan gate findings separately from the unique unresolved business decisions the user must answer or explicitly approve for generation. Planning and generation mode behavior is unchanged: planning mode can pass with warnings for default-applied-for-planning, while generation mode remains blocked until gates are answered or user-default-approved-for-generation is present. v0.6.63 adds planning default approval and exact type gates. Business Clarification validation now supports planning and generation modes: default-applied-for-planning is allowed only for planning-mode validation and blocks generation-mode validation, while user-default-approved-for-generation is required before default-based generation can proceed. Planning validator warning/error counts now require matching findings. Generation Readiness rejects combined exact type/control headings, slash-combined exact implementation values such as Lookup / lookup control, and broad where-supported implementation wording unless marked runtime-proof-required, export-learning-required, or deferred with reason, fallback, and proof impact. App Plan standards require exact Yeeflow type/control/action values to be split into separate columns. Focused regression coverage in test-planning-default-approval-and-exact-type-gates.mjs enforces these cases before design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. v0.6.62 adds Business Clarification and App Plan precision gates. The Business Clarification validator ignores generic hard-gate/proof/validation tables and only parses explicit business clarification sections. Planning output must enumerate every unresolved business decision gate, or clearly state that approving all recommended defaults covers each named gate. Generation readiness reporting separates structural readiness from overall readiness blocked by Business Clarification Gate. App Plan generation-readiness validation rejects ambiguous implementation wording such as slash-combined types or where-supported actions unless marked runtime-proof-required, export-learning-required, or deferred. Document Library planning must use a clear selected Yeeflow resource type or mark uncertainty with the required proof/deferred label. Focused Vendor-style regression coverage in test-business-clarification-and-app-plan-precision-gates.mjs enforces these cases before design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. v0.6.61 adds App Plan control-selection, action, and plugin-supported type/property planning gates. App Plans must explicitly choose record display controls from Data table, Collection, Kanban, Vertical timeline, or Horizontal timeline; prefer Collection over Data table when both are suitable; plan Collection/Kanban/timeline item-template Dynamic controls with field bindings; and explicitly plan or mark not applicable Collection/Kanban item actions and Sub List list actions. App Plan output must use plugin-supported Yeeflow control, action, workflow node, field, variable, property, and binding types, or mark unsupported shapes as export-learning-required, runtime-proof-required, or deferred. Updated validators and regression coverage in test-app-plan-control-action-property-gates.mjs enforce these planning gates before design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. v0.6.60 adds executable Business Clarification Gate, Generation Readiness Review, and Functional Specification to App Plan traceability gates. It adds validate-business-clarification-gate.mjs, validate-generation-readiness-review.mjs, validate-functional-spec-to-app-plan-traceability.mjs, and regression coverage in test-clarification-readiness-traceability-gates.mjs. These gates block progression beyond planning when business decision gates remain unanswered, App Plan resource areas are missing, empty, placeholder-only, or incomplete, or Functional Specification requirements are not mapped to App Plan resources or explicit deferred/not-applicable coverage. They must pass before full-page design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. They prove planning readiness and traceability only, not package validity, business correctness, signing/API acceptance, or runtime behavior. v0.6.59 adds Stage 1 Functional Specification and Stage 2 Yeeflow App Plan flow gates. New application generation must first produce and review the standardized Functional Specification at docs/standards/functional-specification-standard-template.md, then produce and review the Yeeflow resource-order App Plan at docs/standards/app-plan-standard-template.md; docs/app-plan-standard-template.md remains a compatibility entrypoint. It adds validate-functional-specification.mjs, validate-app-plan-resource-order.mjs, and regression coverage in test-functional-specification-and-app-plan-gates.mjs. Form Report is planned as a standalone Yeeflow resource based on Approval Form, not Dashboard, and Placeholder planning is required for Data List fields, Approval Form Submission fields, Task Form fields, and Custom Data List Form fields. Functional Specification and App Plan gates must pass before full-page canonical design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. v0.6.58 adds full-page design blueprint generation gates. Canonical page PNGs must be full-page implementation-ready artifacts, not first-viewport mockups; viewport-only designs with below-fold content, missing planned sections, missing table/form detail, missing page end, unresolved placeholder regions, SVG-only artifacts, and design-board substitutes are rejected. Every page requires an implementation blueprint before Yeeflow resource generation, mapping visible design elements to Yeeflow controls with hierarchy, type, id, semantic nv_label, parent/child relationships, exact property paths, sizing/spacing/border/background/shadow/typography rules, data/list/field bindings, Summary/KPI aggregation, Data Filter variables, Collection/table columns, row links, Dynamic user/person bindings, progress/status/badge bindings, actions, interactions, and runtime proof plan. Property paths must validate against the normalized control-property registry or evidence-backed extension registry. Decoded resources must match the blueprint before package/sign/upgrade and fail on missing section/control, wrong control type, missing property, missing binding, missing action, missing or invalid nv_label, and placeholder/static substitutions. Functional spec, app plan, full-page designs, blueprint validation, control/property validation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, and runtime proof remain separate staged proof layers. Navigation active-style gates from 0.6.57, Supplier runtime/design and proof-layer gates from 0.6.56, dashboard/data-list root-padding gates from 0.6.55, and Summary/filter/collection/content fidelity gates remain baseline behavior; approval-form root padding remains deferred because evidence is mixed, and pixel-perfect or live-runtime proof is claimed only when matching runtime evidence exists. v0.6.56 adds Supplier runtime/design fidelity gates and validation-layer proof gates. Runtime proof must use the installed application ListSetID and runtime URL, not install-log IDs. Generation claims must map design sections, KPI counts, page background/chrome, real Data Filter bindings, filter/action row nv_label, Collection source/detail links, real analytics controls, progress/status treatment, Summary/KPI raw-variable prevention, one canonical PNG per page, and design manifest page count/order/name mapping. Proof reports must keep schemaValidation, appPlanConformance, designContractValidation, controlBindingValidation, exactMetadataShapeValidation, idStabilityValidation, signVerify, installOrUpgrade, runtimeBrowserProof, and pixelComparison separate: schema pass is not UI proof, API/sign/install acceptance is not runtime/browser proof, proof layers must not be collapsed, decoded ListSetID must be tied to runtime URL proof, design-control mapping must be explicit, and the control-binding graph must be complete. Root padding hard gates from 0.6.55 remain baseline behavior, approval-form root padding remains deferred because evidence is mixed, and pixel-perfect or live runtime proof is claimed only when the matching runtime screenshot/pixel comparison and browser evidence is actually run. v0.6.55 adds dashboard and data-list custom form root padding hard gates. Dashboard/app page roots and data-list custom form roots must use attrs.container.cw = "2" plus attrs.container.padding = [null, { top/right/bottom/left: "--sp--s0" }]; scalar zero, numeric object zero, numeric array zero, attrs.common.padding alone, attrs.style.padding alone, and missing or wrong attrs.container.cw are rejected; upgrade and patch flows normalize dashboard page roots and data-list custom form roots before signing or installing; inner containers, cards, grids, and forms may keep intentional spacing; approval form roots are intentionally deferred because evidence is mixed and needs a separate export/runtime proof task. v0.6.54 adds Summary/filter/collection/full-page fidelity gates. It keeps Summary controls as normal type: "summary" controls instead of invalid _ak_c clipboard wrappers; requires page Resource.exts[] Summary pivot metadata with AppID, ListID, ListSetID, and nonempty settings.values[]; requires COUNT Summary settings to use ListDataID; requires top-level and attrs-level save_var/saveVar; requires hidden Summary source hosts hidden on desktop, tablet, and mobile with display:none; requires visible KPI values to bind to Summary temp variables rather than raw variables; reinforces real Data Filter controls instead of static Text, Add/New Containers with action-type "5" and target list metadata, Collection grid-table column gap 0, resolved collection links, progress controls instead of raw formula text, Dynamic user controls bound to User/identity fields, and field type compatibility gates; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, automatic screenshot parsing, or live runtime proof before install/cache smoke and focused runtime testing are performed. v0.6.53 adds Runtime Sample Data and KPI/Table Presentation Fidelity Gates. It adds runtime sample-data proof gates for redacted /users/search AccountID provenance, scoped item PATCH proof for blank User/person values, Events/list item batch-create proof for runtime sample rows, and retry/backoff or delayed verification for batch-created rows; adds Collection grid-table fidelity checks for root overflow hidden, aligned header/body grids, padding parity, real progress bar controls for progress-like columns, numeric progress source fields, Dynamic user/person controls bound to User/identity fields, and semantic nv_label values; adds KPI presentation fidelity checks for formatNumber(...), compact K/M/B formatting, fixed decimal formatting, long raw decimal rejection, and unformatted large-number rejection; reinforces that runtime values remain live and mock values are visual targets only; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, automatic screenshot parsing, or live runtime proof before install/cache smoke and focused runtime testing are performed. v0.6.52 adds KPI/card/table/action content fidelity gates. It makes content fidelity executable through inspect-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs, validating KPI/card rich structure with fixed icon tile, centered icon, inline body, text stack, Summary/value, trend text, and helper text; Summary/raw-variable prevention; live KPI mock-vs-runtime data-value boundaries; rich table badge/progress/avatar/header/row-density treatment; Action Container behavior fidelity; add-list action-type "5" with target list metadata; child Heading/Text action labels; and semantic nv_label requirements. It does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, automatic screenshot parsing, or live runtime proof before install/cache smoke and focused Marketing Event runtime testing are performed. v0.6.51 adds Non-Container Advanced Style Fidelity Gates. It extends the Yeeflow control-property knowledge base with evidence-backed Advanced-tab rules for non-Container controls while keeping Container width, height, and layout under attrs.style, including attrs.style.height, attrs.style.cushei, and attrs.style.cusheiu. It defines non-Container common Advanced-tab styling through attrs.common.positioning, attrs.common.sizing, attrs.common.margin, attrs.common.padding, attrs.common.border, and attrs.common.background; maps attrs.common.positioning.widthtype [null, "1"] to full width, [null, "2"] to inline width, and [null, "3"] to custom width; requires Data Filter dropdown runtime 180px width to use attrs.common.positioning.widthtype [null, "3"], width [null, 180], and widthu [null, "px"]; adds hard gates for non-Container width model mismatch, Data Filter runtime custom width, Container rules applied to non-Container controls, common margin/padding, common border/background/hover/shadow, and two-color gradient boundaries; keeps the normalized product catalog as the base source of truth with evidence-backed extension entries rather than replacing control-configurations.json; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing or automatic screenshot parsing. v0.6.50 adds Data Filter row hierarchy and Navigator label fidelity gates. It requires full-width filter/action parent rows, inline left filter groups, inline right action groups, inline/default-height filter wrapper containers, and Data Filter-owned fixed/custom 180px width; rejects legacy Status/Event Type wrapper width behavior under the 180px extension pattern; adds semantic nv_label guidance for Yeeflow designer Navigator-visible control names; distinguishes id, label, name, and nv_label; validates decoded Resource attrs so normalized specs cannot hide package-level mismatches; keeps the normalized control registry as source of truth and the extension registry evidence-backed; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing or automatic screenshot parsing. v0.6.48 adds the Yeeflow control property knowledge base through docs/reference/yeeflow-control-configurations.normalized.json, docs/reference/yeeflow-control-property-extensions.json, docs/standards/yeeflow-control-property-knowledge-base.md, inspect-yeeflow-control-configurations.mjs, and test-yeeflow-control-property-knowledge-base.mjs. It provides a normalized/redacted product catalog registry with 93 control types and 1,824 control-type property entries; an extensible property extension registry for future evidence-backed export/runtime studies; helper support to list controls, inspect one control, normalize catalog data, and validate generated control specs; catalog-backed integration with UI control-property fidelity gates; and detection or rejection of unknown property paths, wrong-control properties, camelCase aliases, extension-only paths, and needs-study paths according to strictness. It covers Container, Data Filters, action controls, Icon, Heading, Flex Grid, Data List, Collection, Summary, and chart/data analytics controls. The raw control-configurations.json catalog is not committed, and this release does not claim runtime visual proof, pixel-perfect comparison, or automatic screenshot parsing. Remaining future work is to populate extension-registry entries only after redacted export/runtime studies prove missing property paths. v0.6.47 adds UI control property fidelity gates through inspect-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs and test-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs. It validates metadata-only Container attrs, Data Filter controls, filter/action row structure including full-width parent rows, inline filter/action groups, inline/default-height filter wrappers, Data Filter-owned 180px widths, semantic nv_label Navigator names, decoded Resource attrs, KPI card structure, mock-vs-runtime KPI boundaries, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries; reinforces Container vs Grid rules for visual composition, real Data Filter controls instead of static Text for filter UI, filter variables consumed by target Summary/Collection/List controls, refreshed runtime screenshots before capture, and signing/upgrade success not being visual proof; does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing or automatic screenshot parsing; and leaves latest-artifact manifest guard, runtime proof freshness validator, and richer content-fidelity report schema/scoring as future work. v0.6.46 adds runtime navigation proof gates through inspect-runtime-navigation-proof.mjs and test-runtime-navigation-proof-gates.mjs. It validates structured JSON contract/runtime-evidence files only; enforces exact approved primary navigation labels and order, hidden support-resource expectations, explicit browser refresh-before-screenshot metadata, screenshot evidence metadata/path/status, and nav-scoped or exact-line runtime navigation evidence; rejects broad body-text-only navigation scans as unreliable; fails extra visible primary navigation items and support resources visible in primary navigation; reinforces that signing/install/upgrade success is not visual proof; reports app chrome fidelity, primary navigation fidelity, content structure fidelity, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries separately; keeps content-fidelity validators as future work; and does not claim screenshot pixel parsing or Chrome operation. v0.6.45 adds application layout chrome fidelity gates for generated Yeeflow design images. Layout 1 canonical chrome requires a dark header and dark vertical navigation; rejects header hamburger icons and bottom Collapse controls; enforces multi-page consistency for applicationChromeStyleId, header/nav mode, nav background, selected state, app icon/name placement, and content safe area; treats dark/light nav drift as a hard failure; rejects unsupported SaaS shells, arbitrary sidebars, top bars, floating navs, and unsupported navigation chrome; covers the Marketing Event-inspired Event Portfolio versus Planning Workbench regression with HEADER_HAMBURGER_NOT_ALLOWED, NAV_BACKGROUND_MISMATCH, and APPLICATION_CHROME_DRIFT findings; keeps screenshot-derived rules human-reviewed or review-required; and does not claim automated screenshot parsing or pixel-perfect verification. v0.6.44 adds Yeeflow application layout design standards for generated UI design images. It treats PNG/JPEG screenshots as the primary visual source for layout geometry and YAPK exports as supporting structural references only; requires generated page images to use one consistent official Yeeflow layout across the app, covering application-layout-1-vertical-nav, application-layout-2-horizontal-nav, application-layout-3-header-nav, and application-layout-4-no-nav; adds docs/standards/yeeflow-application-layout-design-rules.md, inspect-application-layout-design-rules.mjs, and test-application-layout-design-rules.mjs; requires header/nav/content safe-area rules, page title/action placement, dropdown or expanded menu behavior, and forbidden chrome patterns; supports JSON and Markdown contracts with equivalent structured fields rather than requiring a literal visualLayoutMatrix field; rejects arbitrary SaaS shells, unsupported sidebars, unsupported top bars, floating navs, and unsupported navigation chrome; keeps screenshot-derived rules human-reviewed or review-required unless a real parser exists; and does not claim pixel-perfect verification or automated screenshot understanding. v0.6.43 adds Phase 3B UI workflow enforcement. It adds inspect-ui-closed-loop-workflow-enforcement.mjs to validate workflow/report metadata only; it does not parse or mutate real YAPK packages, call Yeeflow APIs, generate packages, sign, install, import, upgrade, or create runtime evidence. It connects Phase 1, Phase 2, and Phase 3A gates at workflow/report level; enforces required artifacts for high-quality UI, design-fidelity, runtime-quality, and dynamic-KPI claims including UI contract, UI contract validation result, scope manifest and scope validation result for upgrade work, runtime evidence and validation result, design/runtime structure comparison findings, before/after KPI mutation evidence when dynamic KPI proof is claimed, and final report artifact paths; reinforces that install/upgrade success is not visual proof, structure comparison is not dynamic KPI proof, and dynamic KPI proof requires before/after mutation evidence; documents standard generated-ui-contracts, ui-upgrade-scopes, and runtime-evidence artifact paths; and closes the planned UI-quality track so future work is normal incremental improvement unless a new runtime issue class is discovered. v0.6.42 adds Phase 3A UI closed-loop hard gates. It makes the closed-loop workflow mandatory for high-quality UI, design/mockup, dashboard redesign, runtime-proof, Marketing Event-style, and one-page-at-a-time work; requires UI contract generation and validation, a scope manifest, scope validation, local UI/package hard gates, write confirmation before signing/install/upgrade, redacted runtime evidence, design/runtime structure comparison, and iteration on exact failing controls; reinforces that package validation, signing, install, upgrade-check, and upgrade-apply success are not visual proof; reinforces that dynamic KPI proof requires before/after mutation evidence; and adds Marketing Event-inspired synthetic regressions for missing design contracts, missing runtime evidence, one-page scope drift, Summary layout-resource ReportIds/exts/tempVars, top-level Pages[].ReportIds optional-only boundaries, Summary save_var.name and COUNT ListDataID, grid-table detail-link/template/column failures, fake upgrade success evidence, missing table sections, plain scaffold/placeholder detection, warning versus --strict behavior, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries. Phase 3B adds workflow-level enforcement through inspect-ui-closed-loop-workflow-enforcement.mjs, final artifact/report path checks, and metadata gates tying together UI contract, scope, runtime evidence, design/runtime structure comparison, and dynamic KPI mutation proof boundaries. Future UI-quality work is normal incremental improvement unless a new runtime issue class appears.

Current release note: v0.8.87 releases the Application Layout Sidebar Workspace golden reference from PR #313. Generated applications use application-layout-sidebar-workspace-1 as the default application layout template, preserve export-derived header height, title typography, header colors, vertical navigation layout, navigation colors, and appearance settings, require App Plan template selection, and reject generated navigation groups or menu items without business-appropriate FontAwesome icons before signing readiness. v0.8.86 releases Approval form page-title empty section cleanup from PR #311. Generated Approval submission/task pages and Data List/Schedule workflow task forms prune empty section_content_area slots outside real business content, including page_title_section empty slots, while preserving locked workflow panel/history surfaces, and validation rejects empty generated section content slots through APPROVAL_FORM_LAYOUT_EMPTY_SECTION_CONTENT_AREA before signing readiness.
interface.defaultPrompt:
Use Yeeflow App Builder v0.8.64 to plan, generate, validate, and harden Yeeflow application packages. Before any Yeeflow API operation, check the REST API capability map, use only documented capabilities, check OAuth/API auth status, and if OAuth is missing or expired return plugin-login-flow guidance with auth_required / login_flow_required while preserving the original operation. Use read-only workspace and job-position discovery plus explicit target workspace confirmation for package install/import/upgrade. Require explicit confirmation for write capabilities, stronger confirmation for package install/import/upgrade/delete, and confirmed system-admin permission before job-position create/update/assign/remove writes. Treat schemas, package validators, workflow validators, assignment task assignee proof, runtime binding checks, API acceptance, plan-conformance checks, YAPK signing, generated-final YAPK ID provenance, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata, YAPK upgrade ID stability, dashboard/data-list root padding hard gates for attrs.container.cw = "2" and token-array --sp--s0 root padding, dashboard grid-table Collection validation, UI/Summary/KPI runtime evidence, aggregate UI hard-gate smoke, control property knowledge base checks with inspect-yeeflow-control-configurations.mjs for legal product-catalog or extension-registry property paths, no invented property paths, wrong-control/camelCase/needs-study detection, control-property and content fidelity with inspect-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs for Summary full-page fidelity gates for normal type: "summary" controls, no _ak_c wrapper children, Resource.exts[] Summary pivot metadata with AppID/ListID/ListSetID and settings.values[], COUNT ListDataID settings, top-level and attrs-level save_var/saveVar, hidden Summary source hosts with display:none, visible KPI Summary temp-variable binding, Container attrs, Data Filter controls, filter/action row structure, KPI/card rich structure, fixed icon tiles, centered icons, inline bodies, text stacks, Summary/value hierarchy, trend/helper text, Summary/raw-variable prevention, live KPI data-value boundaries, rich table badge/progress/avatar/header/row-density treatment, Action Container behavior metadata, add-list action-type "5" target-list metadata, child Heading/Text action labels, semantic nv_label requirements, runtime sample-data proof gates for redacted AccountID provenance, scoped item PATCH proof, batch-create proof, retry/backoff verification, Collection grid-table overflow/alignment/padding/progress/Dynamic user fidelity, KPI formatNumber compact K/M/B fixed-decimal presentation, long raw decimal rejection, unformatted large-number rejection, mock-vs-runtime KPI boundaries, dynamic KPI proof boundaries, Container vs Grid visual-composition rules, real Data Filter controls instead of static Text, Add/New action Containers with action-type "5" and target list metadata, Collection grid-table column gap 0, resolved collection links, progress controls instead of raw formula text, Dynamic user controls bound to User/identity fields, field type compatibility gates, extension-backed Radio Filter and Relative Period dropdown visual patterns, wrapper/input/dropdown-panel layer checks, native 16px filter icon controls, non-Container Advanced-tab style fidelity for attrs.common.positioning/sizing/margin/padding/border/background, Data Filter runtime 180px custom width through attrs.common.positioning widthtype [null, "3"], and two-color gradient boundaries, filter variable binding and target Summary/Collection/List consumption, refreshed runtime screenshots, and signing/upgrade visual-proof boundaries, runtime navigation proof with inspect-runtime-navigation-proof.mjs for exact approved primary navigation labels/order, hidden support-resource expectations, explicit refresh-before-screenshot metadata, nav-scoped or exact-line evidence, broad body-text nav scan rejection, support resources visible in primary nav failure, and signing/install/upgrade visual-proof boundaries, redacted runtime evidence templates, exact UUID Summary KPI proof, Data Analytics control identity guardrails, and approved app-plan hard gates as separate proof boundaries. Enforce Yeeflow application layout design standards and application chrome fidelity gates for generated design images, require one of the four official layouts with screenshot-primary visual rules, canonical Layout 1 dark header/dark vertical nav chrome, no header hamburger or bottom Collapse controls for Layout 1, multi-page chrome consistency, nav drift rejection, and no arbitrary app shells, then enforce standard app-plan structure, page-by-page UI implementation contracts, design/mockup-to-contract scaffolding with human review required when no reliable vision parser is available, Phase 2 design-to-runtime structural comparison without pixel-perfect visual diffing or full automatic image understanding, Phase 3A mandatory closed-loop workflow for high-quality UI/design/mockup/dashboard redesign/runtime-proof/Marketing Event-style/one-page-at-a-time work, Phase 3B workflow/report metadata enforcement with inspect-ui-closed-loop-workflow-enforcement.mjs before high-quality UI/design-fidelity claims, standard artifact path reporting, and final report evidence-chain checks, sandbox-page proof for uncertain UI/runtime patterns, export-proven Yeeflow control/style shapes, designer-shaped hidden Summary configuration with real fields, filters, temp variables, save_var expression objects, layout-resource Resource.ReportIds, matching Resource.exts, and Resource.tempVars, exact UUID Summary v1.0.1 dynamic KPI proof only when matching layout-resource ReportIds/exts/tempVars/headc variable bindings and before/after refreshed mutation evidence are present, explicit fallback labels when KPI values are not runtime-proven, UUID/runtime-safe IDs for Data Analytics controls, redacted runtime screenshot/evidence before UI-quality claims, structural design-to-runtime comparison against redacted runtime evidence before UI-quality claims, declared UI upgrade scope validation for ListSetID/app identity/page/resource/list/field/form/workflow/navigation/numeric ID drift, API-issued content ID provenance for generated-final .yapk, YAPK upgrade/new-version ID continuity for existing semantic resources, complete navigation runtime metadata, dashboard grid-table Collection wrapper/detail-link rules when planned, dashboard Summary layout-resource ReportIds/ext/tempVars bindings, filter variable consumption, approval real controls, navigation reachability, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID suitability, service portal gating, signing/API proof boundaries, and policy-as-data modeling before calling a generated app ready.

Current release note: v0.8.64 releases layout cleanup, live install readiness, and validator-entrypoint alignment gates from PR #267. Generated Dashboard, Data List form, and Approval form layouts prune unused copied sections; Approval task forms preserve Submission form business fields as readonly context unless explicitly overridden; generated-final signing readiness rejects placeholder TenantID "0"; runtime proof scopes Install failed tiles to the target app; and public YAPK validator entrypoints remain byte-aligned to prevent duplicate-rule drift. v0.8.63 releases Data List custom form LayoutView runtime-source gates from PR #265. Generated Type 1 custom Data List forms duplicate complete form JSON into both LayoutView and LayoutInResources[0].Resource, and generated-final validation blocks missing, placeholder, or drifting LayoutView runtime sources before signing readiness. v0.8.61 releases Approval form unused section cleanup gates from PR #261. Generated Approval submission/task pages remove no-action Operations containers, remove empty copied business sections, preserve the locked action_panel_flow_history_wrapper, and keep fieldless generated forms valid with a single no-fields business content card instead of unused template scaffolding. v0.8.59 releases Approval form field materialization hard gates from PR #257. App Plan Submission Form Fields and Task Form Fields are generation inputs; generated Forms[].DefResource.pageurls[].formdef must contain planned business fields inside approved Approval Form Field Layouts v1.1 wrappers; and shell-only Approval forms are blocked before signing readiness. v0.8.58 releases Data List custom form default-layout hard gates from PR #254. Generated business Data Lists and Document Libraries must plan and assign custom New/Edit/View forms instead of Yeeflow default layouts; List.LayoutView.add/edit/view must resolve to same-list Type 1 custom form layouts; App Plan Section 10 must cover every Section 4 business list/library with New/Edit and View Data List Form Layouts v1.1 template selections; and the full-app materializer, generated data-list schema validator, and YAPK package validator now enforce the same routing contract before signing readiness. v0.8.54 releases Dashboard filter runtime and full-upgrade proof gates from PR #246. Generated Dashboards must not use unproven page-level select-filter variables consumed by Collection In conditions because empty select-filter state can clear all Collection rows at runtime. Search-filter/fulltext display is preferred until an export-proven empty-value bypass exists. Dashboard-only upgrades must be full packages with non-Dashboard resources preserved and unchanged-diff proof, and final runtime proof requires business rows, no No data, no [object Object], real Data List Collection bindings, search-filter behavior, exact PackageId Version Management Succeed, and error-log capture on failure. v0.8.53 releases standard Data Filter group golden reference gates from PR #244. Pages/forms with two or more page-level Data Filter controls must clone dashboard_standard_filter_group, preserve the approved wrapper and child filter style contract, exclude local Collection toolbar search controls, and pass generated-final preflight before signing readiness. v0.8.50 releases signing-readiness preflight handoff reporting from PR #237. Standalone materialization remains signing-ineligible and reports materializerSigningEligible false, preflightEligibleForSigning null, and signingReadinessSource not-run. yapk-first-generation-preflight now reports the actual local pre-sign readiness with preflightEligibleForSigning and signingReadiness so a passed preflight can proceed to explicit signing without misreading the materializer boundary as a package-quality failure. v0.8.46 releases root application icon, Dashboard empty-section, and filter-shape hard gates from PR #229.
